title: KATHMANDU COUNTRYSIDE HIKE
tagline: An exciting countryside experience
highlights: Short and easy trekking near Kathmandu valley
Spectacular mountainous view
Insightful and architectural Namo Buddha monastery
Traditional life style of local people & culture
Buddhist norms, meditation and yoga activities
Mixture lifestyle of Aryan, Tibetan & Newari culture
description: Chisapani-Nagarkot-Dhulikhel-Namo Buddha- Kathmandu trek is one of the easier trekking trail in Nepal designed to explore nature and culture of Nepal’s countryside and the amazing mountain views. This trek is also known as Around Kathmandu Valley Trek. It is an excellent trek for those who wish to avoid a long, strenuous trek or have time only for a short and easy trek and fit for all age group and for all seasons.

itinerary.title: Drive to Sundarijal & trek to Chisapani (2160m)
itinerary.desc: Take a short drive from Kathmandu to Sundarijal and start our trekking to Chisapani where you will be enjoying the real beauty of nature with the Himalayan view.

itinerary.title: Chisopani – Nagarkot (2175m)
itinerary.desc: Today we hike towards Nagarkot. It is the famous panoramic hillside from where we can get picturesque view of sunrise and sunset.

itinerary.title: Nagarkot – Dhulikhel (1550m)
itinerary.desc: Our journey continues to Dhulikhel from Nagarkot. Dhulikhel is the trade hub for the surrounding places and ancient Nepal- Tibet trade point where we can see the Newari and Nepali lifestyle.

itinerary.title: Dhulikhel – Namo Buddha (1810m)
itinerary.desc: The trail proceeds through unspoiled villages. Eventually, after 5/6 hrs treks bring you to a Tibetan Buddhist village Namobuddha with beautiful chorten and monastery.

itinerary.title: Namo Buddha – Panauti – Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek to legendary village Panauti and explore ancient temples. After lunch drive to historical heritage site Bhaktapur and then back to Kathmandu.

title: FAMILY HOLIDAY
tagline: An exciting Tour with Kids
highlights: UNESCO world heritage sites in Kathmandu
Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
Trishuli River Rafting experience
Wildlife Safari in Chitwan National Park
4 days trekking to Ghorepani Poonhill
Lake city Pokhara exploration
description: This is an outstanding tour package to spend a quality holiday with your family around the Himalaya. The holiday with your family and kids in Nepal starts from the capital city of Kathmandu, traveling through scenic Pokhara, wild Chitwan, and completing with a beautiful trek to Poonhill.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath, Bhaktapur Durbar Square, and Patan Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
itinerary.desc: Drive towards Thankot for a cable car tour with panoramic views of Kathmandu valley and Himalayan ranges.

itinerary.title: Trishuli Rafting - Drive to Chitwan
itinerary.desc: Fun filled rafting from Fishling to Kurintar, then drive towards Chitwan National Park.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Jungle Activities
itinerary.desc: Elephant ride, canoe ride, bird watching, elephant bathing, and village tour.

itinerary.title: Chitwan - Pokhara Drive
itinerary.desc: Short bird watching at Chitwan, drive to Pokhara, and boating tour at Fewa Lake.

itinerary.title: Drive to Naya Pul and trek to Ulleri
itinerary.desc: Start the trekking portion of the trip with an amazing view on the trail.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ulleri to Ghorepani
itinerary.desc: Walk through lush forests with exclusive mountain views of Annapurna South.

itinerary.title: Sunrise at Poon Hill & trek to Ghandruk
itinerary.desc: 45 minutes upward hike to Poon Hill for a mighty Himalayan sunrise view.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghandruk back to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Head back to Naya Pul through green forests and drive back to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing & fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Sunrise at Sarangkot, city tour (Davis Fall, Gupteswor Cave), and short flight back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to the airport for final departure.

Birth place of Gautam Buddha
Central attraction for Buddhist pilgrimage

description: Lumbini is one of the popular tourist destinations of Nepal. It is the birthplace of Gautam Buddha, famously known as the capital of Buddhism, situated in the Southern Terai at an altitude of 600 ft.

itinerary.desc: Scenic 7-8 hours drive to Lumbini. Stroll around the local market in the evening.

itinerary.title: Explore Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Visit Lumbini Garden, Maya Devi Temple, Pushkarni Pool, and various international monasteries (Thai, Sri Lankan, Chinese, etc.).

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu

itinerary.title: Trek from Tikhedunga to Nayapul and drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Gentle descent to Birethanti and drive to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Morning Hike to World Peace Stupa and afternoon fly back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Panoramic views from Stupa. Flight back to capital.

itinerary.title: Final Departure from Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for scheduled flight.

title: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP VIA GHOREPANI
tagline: A Journey into the Heart of the Annapurna Sanctuary
highlights: Poon Hill Sunrise: Iconic views of Dhaulagiri and Annapurna massifs
Annapurna Sanctuary: Natural amphitheater surrounded by 7000m+ peaks
description: Iconic journey. Includes famous Poon Hill viewpoint and deep sanctuary trek.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara drive by Bus
itinerary.desc: 6-hour drive through Prithivi Highway. Evening Fewa Lake visit.

itinerary.title: Drive to Nayapul and trek to Tikhe Dhunga (1495m)
itinerary.desc: 1-hour drive and 3-4 hour trek. Easy climb.

itinerary.title: Tikhedunga to Ghorepani Trek (2860m)
itinerary.desc: 6-hour uphill walk through pastures and rhododendron woods.

itinerary.title: Ghorepani to Tadapani Trek (2520m)
itinerary.desc: Early morning Poon Hill sunrise hike. Retrace steps and continue to Tadapani.

itinerary.title: Tadapani to Chhomrong Trek (2020m)
itinerary.desc: Descend stone stairs and ascend through forest to reach Kimrong and Chhomrong.

itinerary.title: Chhomrong to Doban (2850m)
itinerary.desc: Descend to river and ascend through tropical bamboo forest to Doban.

itinerary.title: Doban to MBC Trek (3700m)
itinerary.desc: Step-by-step ascent to Himalayan Hotel and on to Machhapuchhre BC.

itinerary.title: MBC to Annapurna Base Camp trek (4130m)
itinerary.desc: Uninterrupted ridgeline views of Annapurna I, III and Machapuchare.

itinerary.title: Annapurna Base Camp to Bamboo Trek (2300m)
itinerary.desc: 6-hour descent through forests and villages.

itinerary.title: Bamboo to Jhinu Danda Trek (1780m)
itinerary.desc: 5-hour descent. Explore surroundings and enjoy lovely sunset views.

itinerary.title: Jhinu Danda to Nayapul Trek and drive back to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Final day of trekking. Drive to Pokhara and explore Sarangkot.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return to capital. Optional flight. Rest and strolling.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.desc: Airport transfer and farewell.

title: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH NAR-PHU VALLEY
tagline: The Forbidden Valleys & High Passes Odyssey
highlights: Kang La Pass (5,322m) & Thorong La Pass (5,416m)
Restricted Nar & Phu Valleys: Authentic Tibetan-style villages
Ancient Tashi Lhakhang Monastery in Phu village
Tilicho Lake (4,919m): One of the highest lakes in the world
description: Combines classic circuit with remote restricted valleys. Stone villages, hidden monasteries, and massive peaks.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Beshishahar (760m)
itinerary.desc: Drive along Kathmandu-Pokhara Highway.

itinerary.title: Trek from Beshishahar to Bahundanda (1310m)
itinerary.desc: Enjoy sceneries and Gurung culture. Steep climb to Bahundanda.

itinerary.title: Trek from Bahundanda to Chamje (1430m)
itinerary.desc: Descend and walk through rice terraces and forests.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chamje to Dharapani (1860m)
itinerary.desc: Descend to river, cross bridge and climb to Sattale and Tal.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dharapani to Koto
itinerary.desc: 5-hour walk with views of Annapurna II and Manaslu.

itinerary.title: Trek from Koto to Dharmasala
itinerary.desc: Cross river into Nar Phu valley. Walk through woods and caves.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dharmasala to Kayang
itinerary.desc: 6.5-hour walk through scenic Meta Kharka. Share trail with yaks.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kayang to Phu village
itinerary.desc: See unique colorful Chortens and the three villages of Phu.

itinerary.title: Excursion around Phu valley
itinerary.desc: Walk to Ngoru summer grazing settlement. Observe yak spinning.

itinerary.title: Trek from Phu valley to Junam
itinerary.desc: Retrace steps back to Junam Kharka for camping.

itinerary.title: Trek from Junam to Nar
itinerary.desc: Reach Nar gates for sublime views of the village.

itinerary.title: Explore Nar village
itinerary.desc: Interact with locals, see carpentry and prayer flag printing.

itinerary.title: Trek from Nar village to Ngwal via Kang La pass
itinerary.desc: Spectacular pass overlooking Annapurna II and Tilicho peak.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ngwal to Manang
itinerary.desc: 3-hour walk through pine forests and farming terraces.

itinerary.title: Trek from Manang to Yak Kharka (4350m)
itinerary.desc: 3.5-hour ascent through Gunsang village.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yak Kharka to Thorong Phedi (4420m)
itinerary.desc: 3.5-hour walk. Crossing via wooden bridge and unstable spree slopes.

itinerary.title: Trek from Thorong Phedi to Muktinath via Thorong La
itinerary.desc: 7-hour trek over the highest pass (5416m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Muktinath to Kagbeni (2895 m)
itinerary.desc: 3.5-hour trek through dramatic Kali Gandaki Gorge.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kagbeni to Marpha (2650m)
itinerary.desc: 5.5-hour walk along the river bank.

itinerary.title: Trek from Marpha to Ghasa (2013m)
itinerary.desc: 6-hour walk with views of Nilgiri North and Annapurna I.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghasa to Tatopani (1189 m)
itinerary.desc: 5-hour walk. Visit Rukse Waterfall and deepest gorge.

itinerary.title: Rest day at Tatopani
itinerary.desc: Relax in the natural hot spring bath.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tatopani to Ghorepani (2853 m)
itinerary.desc: 7-hour trek with panoramic views of Dhaulagiri ranges.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghorepani to Poon Hill to Hille
itinerary.desc: 5-hour walk. Sunrise views over majestic Himalayan mountains.

itinerary.title: Trek from Hille to Nayapul, drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Descend following Bhurung Khola and drive back.

itinerary.title: Drive from Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Return to Kathmandu with views of green sceneries.

title: ANNAPURNA SEVEN PASSES
tagline: The Ultimate Wilderness & High Pass Challenge
highlights: Cross Seven High Passes including Thorong La and Kang La
Explore the restricted Nar & Phu valleys and hidden Manang
Complete bypass of road-heavy sections of the traditional circuit
description: The ultimate wilderness experience in Annapurna. Bypasses modern roads through hidden valleys and over ancient trails.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive to Tal – 12 Hrs Drive
itinerary.desc: Drive to Besisahar and on to Tal by jeep.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tilje (2300m)
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk by the side of Marshyangdi River.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tachai (2340m)
itinerary.desc: 5-hour walk through pine forest and cornfields.

itinerary.title: Trek to Shongle (3360m)
itinerary.desc: 8-hour walk with views of Ghelinchok villages.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kuchumro Phedi (4217m)
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour walk. Camp at 4525m for the big climb.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namakyu via Kuchumro and Yarcha Pass
itinerary.desc: 10-hour trek crossing two passes (4860m). Views of Manasalu.

itinerary.title: Trek to Meta via Meta Pass
itinerary.desc: 8-hour trek. Views of Lamjung Himal and Annapurna II.

itinerary.title: Trek to Phu (4204m)
itinerary.desc: 9-hour walk with early sunrise views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Loang via Phu Pass
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hour trek. Climb 1000m above Phu village.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chekchu via Nar Pass
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk crossing Nar pass (5400m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Nar Village (4110m)
itinerary.desc: 5-hour trek with steep uphill to reach the beautiful village.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kangla Phedi (4530m)
itinerary.desc: 3-hour easy walk from Nar through the valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to Ngawal via Kangla Pass
itinerary.desc: Ascend to 5350m pass for views of Pisang peak. Descend to Ngawal.

itinerary.title: Rest Day in Ngawal (3360m)
itinerary.desc: Interact with local people. Overnight in Mountain Home.

itinerary.title: Trek to Manang (3519m)
itinerary.desc: 4-hour walk with views of Mt. Annapurna.

itinerary.title: Trek to Letdar (4250m)
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk as you leave Marshyangdi Valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to Phedi or High Camp (4600m)
itinerary.desc: Uphill walk towards Thorong Phedi.

itinerary.title: Trek to Muktinath via Thorong Pass
itinerary.desc: 8-9 hour trek. Cross the Great Barrier Ridge.

itinerary.title: Trek to Jomsom (2710m)
itinerary.desc: 5-hour downhill walk to Kali Gandaki Gorge.

itinerary.title: Fly to Jomsom and drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Flight to Pokhara and return to capital by bus.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Shopping and relaxation in the city.

itinerary.title: International Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for flight.

title: DOLPO AND MUGU (GREAT HIMALAYAN TRAIL)
tagline: The Wild West Traverse
description: This extraordinary 28-day journey follows a section of the Great Himalayan Trail, traversing from the remote region of Upper Dolpo to the pristine Rara Lake in Mugu. You will cross numerous high passes, visit ancient Bon and Buddhist monasteries like Shey Gompa, and experience the true isolation of the 'hidden land' of Dolpo. This is a trek for serious adventurers seeking to experience the most remote parts of Nepal.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu (1350m)
itinerary.desc: Arrival and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Fly to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Afternoon flight to the lowland Terai region.

itinerary.title: Fly to Juphal and trek to Rupghat
itinerary.desc: 40 min flight to Juphal. 3 hour trek to Rupghat (2050m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Chepka
itinerary.desc: Cross Anke Khola and pass scattered villages to reach camp (2850m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Renje and Samduwa
itinerary.desc: Trek through forests and meadows to reach Samduwa (3085m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Palam and Ringmo on to Phoksumdo Lake
itinerary.desc: Steep climb through forest to reach the turquoise lake (3600m).

itinerary.title: Acclimatisation day at Phoksumdo Lake
itinerary.desc: Rest and explore Ringmo village and its monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek the spectacular lakeside trail
itinerary.desc: High traverse around the lake to camp at 4000m.

itinerary.title: Trek to Snowfields Camp
itinerary.desc: Long climb up a narrow gorge to the foot of Kang La (4600m).

itinerary.title: Cross the Kang La into Inner Dolpo and Shey Gompa
itinerary.desc: Cross 5350m pass. Reach the legendary Shey Gompa (4370m).

itinerary.title: Rest and exploration at Shey Gompa
itinerary.desc: Visit Tsa Kang monastery on a cliff face.

itinerary.title: Trek to Samling Monastery or Tora
itinerary.desc: Trek north across open hillsides to Tora or Samling (4120m).

itinerary.title: Samling Monastery and trek to Bhijer
itinerary.desc: Visit the oldest Bon Gompa and reach the Tibetan village of Bhijer (3850m).

itinerary.title: Cross the Yambur La and descend to the Tora Khola
itinerary.desc: 4 hour abrupt climb over 4800m pass. Descend to camp near wooden bridge.

itinerary.title: A short trek to Pho
itinerary.desc: Reach the extremely remote village of Pho (4020m). Afternoon free.

itinerary.title: Trek to a high camp before Nyingma Gyanzen La
itinerary.desc: 3 hour climb on yak trail to high camp at 4900m.

itinerary.title: Cross the Nyingma Gyanzen La to the Swaksa Khola
itinerary.desc: Cross 5500m pass with views of Kanjiroba. Descend to 4500m.

itinerary.title: Cross the Yala La to Chyandi Khola
itinerary.desc: 3 hour climb over 5250m pass. Reach camp in the valley (4800m).

itinerary.title: Descend the Chyandi Khola to Takla Khola
itinerary.desc: Challenging day negotiating difficult terrain and river crossings.

itinerary.title: Cross the Chyargo La and descend to Thajuchaur
itinerary.desc: 5 hour climb to 5100m pass. Descend into gorge-like valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to the Mugu River then up-valley to Mugu
itinerary.desc: Join the main trail to Rara. Reach Mugu village (3400m).

itinerary.title: Rest day at Mugu
itinerary.desc: Free day to interact with Mugu villagers or take short walks.

itinerary.title: Trek to Pulu or Riusa
itinerary.desc: Descend to the confluence of Mugu and NamlangNadi.

itinerary.title: Trek via Mangri to Kumpha
itinerary.desc: Interact with locals while trekking beside Mugu Karnali (2010m).

itinerary.title: Trek through Gamgadhi to Talcha Airport
itinerary.desc: Final day of trekking with a steady climb to the airport (2750m).

itinerary.title: Fly to Nepalgunj and onward to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Early morning flight back to the capital.

itinerary.title: Free day in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Rest, shopping, and sightseeing.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for your flight home.

title: LOWER DOLPA
tagline: The Pristine Phoksundo Odyssey
description: Lower Dolpa trek is a relatively moderate adventure compared to the high-altitude crossings of Upper Dolpa, but it offers equally stunning natural beauty. The highlight of the trek is the deep turquoise Phoksundo Lake, the deepest lake in the world. You will pass through diverse landscapes, from subtropical forests to alpine meadows, and visit traditional villages of the Magar and Gurung people.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Pickup and escort to your hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Bus or fly to the town near the Indian border.

itinerary.title: Nepalgunj to Juphal and Dunai
itinerary.desc: 35 min flight. Trek through local villages to Dunai (2150m).

itinerary.title: Dunai to Tarakot
itinerary.desc: Trek along Barbung Khola to the hilltop fortress of Dzong.

itinerary.title: Tarakot to Mushi Khola
itinerary.desc: Trek to a large meadow camp at Musi Kharka.

itinerary.title: Musi Khola to Karkot Village
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour trek to Kakoat through interesting scenery.

itinerary.title: Karkot Village to Pimari Village
itinerary.desc: Continue trek through the remote valley.

itinerary.title: Pimari Village to Shabha kharka
itinerary.desc: Trek through pine and juniper forests to grazing site.

itinerary.title: Shabha kharka to Papta Chanla BC
itinerary.desc: Arduous trek to the base of the pass.

itinerary.title: Papta to Dho Takyo via Chanla Pass
itinerary.desc: Cross 5200m pass. Reach the uppermost village of the region.

itinerary.title: Dho Takyo Village- Rest day
itinerary.desc: Explore monasteries and chortens in this Gurung village.

itinerary.title: Dho Takyo Village to Numala Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Trek through high desert country with eroded pillars.

itinerary.title: Numala BC to Danigar via Numala Pass
itinerary.desc: Cross 5190m pass. Views of Topo Peak and Norbukang Himal.

itinerary.title: Danigar to Yak kharka via Bagala pass
itinerary.desc: Cross 5070m pass with views of Kanjiroba massif.

itinerary.title: Yak Kharka to Rigmo Phoksundo Lake
itinerary.desc: Descend through pine forests to the turquoise lake (3610m).

itinerary.title: Phoksundo – Rest Day
itinerary.desc: Explore the magnificent lake and natural sites.

itinerary.title: Phoksundo to Pugmo Village
itinerary.desc: Trek through birch and juniper forests to Pugmo (3500m).

itinerary.title: Pugmo Village to Kagmara High Camp
itinerary.desc: Follow Pungmo khola through beautiful forests.

itinerary.title: High Camp to Kagmara Phedi via Kagmara pass
itinerary.desc: Cross 5115m pass. Sensational panoramic views.

itinerary.title: Kagmara Phedi to Toijum
itinerary.desc: Descend through waterfalls and moraines.

itinerary.title: Toijum to Kaigaon
itinerary.desc: High trail above Bheri River to Kaigaon (2610m).

itinerary.title: Kaigaon Village to Chaurikot
itinerary.desc: Panoramic view of distant Dhaulagiri Himal from 3700m.

itinerary.title: Churikot to Chotra
itinerary.desc: Trek to Khampa village with typical Mani walls.

itinerary.title: Chotra to Gothichaur
itinerary.desc: Trek through flat land with 13th century Malla carvings.

itinerary.title: Gothichaur to Jumla Khalanga Bazaar
itinerary.desc: Steep ascent over Pattyata Lagna Pass to Jumla (2540m).

itinerary.title: Jumla to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Return flight back to the plains.

itinerary.title: Depart Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Final transfer for your flight home.

title: POKHARA & DOLPO
tagline: The Grand Trans-Himalayan Traverse
description: This marathon 33-day trek is one of the most challenging and rewarding journeys in Nepal. Starting from Pokhara, it traverses through the Dhaulagiri and Dolpo regions, crossing multiple high passes and visiting the sacred Phoksundo Lake. You will experience a vast range of cultures, from Hindu hill villages to Tibetan Buddhist and Bon communities, all while witnessing some of the most dramatic mountain scenery on earth.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Bus drive (7-8 hours). Boating on Fewa lake.

itinerary.title: Pokhara to Beni to Durbang
itinerary.desc: Jeep drive with views of Annapurna South and Machhapuchre.

itinerary.title: Durbang to Phalek
itinerary.desc: Start the trekking towards Phalek village.

itinerary.title: Phalek to Moureni
itinerary.desc: Trek through villages with ascending mountain views.

itinerary.title: Moureni to Gurjaghat
itinerary.desc: Ascend over Jaljala pass through rhododendron forests.

itinerary.title: Gurjaghat to Dhorpatan
itinerary.desc: Trek through pine and juniper forest to hunting reserve (2830m).

itinerary.title: Dhorpatan to Phagune Phedi
itinerary.desc: Hike towards Phagune Pass through grasslands.

itinerary.title: Phagune Phedi to Thankur
itinerary.desc: Cross the pass surrounded by green hills.

itinerary.title: Thankur to Tatopani
itinerary.desc: Slight descending through the jungle to 2400m hot springs.

itinerary.title: Tatopani to Dhule
itinerary.desc: Ascend to temporary settlement at 3300m.

itinerary.title: Dhule to Seng khola
itinerary.desc: Ascend to 4000m with mountain and hill views.

itinerary.title: Seng khola to Purbang
itinerary.desc: Ascend to Puphal Tal (small lake) and descend to Purbang.

itinerary.title: Purbang to Sahartara
itinerary.desc: Cross Jangla pass for views of Kanjirowa. Reach Lingdo (2600m).

itinerary.title: Sahartara to Lahini
itinerary.desc: Trek beside river in large green valley. Spot musk deer.

itinerary.title: Lahini to Nawarpani
itinerary.desc: Narrow and adventurous trail through landslide area (3475m).

itinerary.title: Nawarpani to Dho Tarap
itinerary.desc: Negotiate deep gorges and small bridges to reach 4040m.

itinerary.title: Dho Tarap- rest day
itinerary.desc: Visit monasteries and enjoy traditional dances.

itinerary.title: Dho Tarap to Numala Base camp
itinerary.desc: Trek through grassy meadows with wild flowers to 5360m.

itinerary.title: Numala BC to Danighar via Numala Pass
itinerary.desc: Cross 5190m pass to Bagala Base Camp.

itinerary.title: Danighar to Yak Kharka via Bagala Pass
itinerary.desc: Cross 5070m pass with views of Kanjiroba massif.

itinerary.title: Yak Kharka to Ringmo to Phoksundo Lake
itinerary.desc: 7-hour trek to the sacred turquoise lake (3728m).

itinerary.title: Phoksundo Lake- Rest Day
itinerary.desc: Explore glaciers and ancient Bon-po religious sites.

itinerary.title: Phoksundo Lake to Pungmo
itinerary.desc: Trek through thin forest to Pugmo village.

itinerary.title: Pungmo to Lasa
itinerary.desc: Ascend through jungle to open land camp.

itinerary.title: Lasa to Kagmarala Phedi
itinerary.desc: Uphill to Kagmara La pass and descend.

itinerary.title: Kagmara Phedi to Toijum
itinerary.desc: Trek through thin forest to army post.

itinerary.title: Toijum to Kaingaon
itinerary.desc: Trek through walnut forest to Hurikot (2610m).

itinerary.title: Kaingaon to Ghodakhor
itinerary.desc: Trek through Pine and Silverbirch to Balangra pass.

itinerary.title: Ghodakhor to Tripurakot
itinerary.desc: Descend through villages. Visit holy Hindu temple.

itinerary.title: Tripurakot to Juphal
itinerary.desc: Final ascent through Motipur to Juphal.

itinerary.title: Juphal to Nepalgunj and Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Morning flight back to capital.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Final farewell and airport transfer.

title: DOLPO TO JOMSOM VIA GHT ROUTE
tagline: The Upper Dolpo Crossing
description: This high-altitude trek follows the Upper Dolpo section of the Great Himalayan Trail, crossing into the Mustang region at Jomsom. It visits the sacred Shey Gompa and the mystical Crystal Mountain, traversing high passes like Nangdala and Shey La. This is a journey through true Tibetan-style culture and some of the most rugged terrain in the world.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu (1400 m)
itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Fly to the gateway of the West.

itinerary.title: Nepalgunj to Juphal and Dunai
itinerary.desc: 35 min flight. 3 hour easy trek to Dunai.

itinerary.title: Dunai to Chhepka (2687m)
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek through lush tropical forests.

itinerary.title: Chhepka to Chunuwar
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek beside Phoksundo Khola.

itinerary.title: Chunuwar to Phoksundo Lake (3600m)
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour climb to the turquoise lake.

itinerary.title: Phoksundo – Rest day
itinerary.desc: Explore Ringmo village and Tshowa monastery.

itinerary.title: Phoksundo- Sallaghari
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to beautiful camp site.

itinerary.title: Sallaghari to Nangdala HC
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to high camp at 4100m.

itinerary.title: Nangdala HC to Shey Gompa via Nangdala pass
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek over 5240m pass to the sacred monastery.

itinerary.title: Shey Gompa to Namgung Gompa via Shey La Pass
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour climb over Shey La to Namgung.

itinerary.title: Namgong Gompa to Saldang
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour trek descending to Saldang village.

itinerary.title: Saldang to Day hike to Yangjer Gumba
itinerary.desc: Hike to 4599m monastery and back.

itinerary.title: Saldang to Khoma village
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek to Komash village.

itinerary.title: Khoma village to Shimen
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek spotting endangered animals.

itinerary.title: Shimen to Tinje
itinerary.desc: Trek beside Panjyang Khola to Tinje.

itinerary.title: Tinje to Yak Kharka
itinerary.desc: Trek to open grazing ground for sheep.

itinerary.title: Yak Kharka to Chharka via Mola Pass
itinerary.desc: 5 hour walk over 5030m pass to Chharka.

itinerary.title: Chharka to Norbulung
itinerary.desc: Trek through arid high land camp.

itinerary.desc: Cross 5120m and 5550m passes. Night stop at 4247m.

itinerary.title: Ghalden Ghuldum to Sangta
itinerary.desc: Ups and downs to reach Sangta village (3777m).

itinerary.title: Santa to Phalyak
itinerary.desc: Climb and descend into Kali Gandaki valley.

itinerary.title: Phalyak to Jomsom
itinerary.desc: Climb to 3360m ridge and challenging descent to Jomsom.

itinerary.title: Jomsom to Pokhara and Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Fly to Pokhara and return to capital.
