title: LUMBA SUMBA PASS
tagline: A Remote Crossing Between Kanchenjunga and Makalu
description: Lumba Sumba Pass trek is one of the most adventurous trekking routes in Nepal, crossing the high Lumba Sumba Pass (5,200m). This trek links the two great Himalayan massifs of Kanchenjunga and Makalu. The journey takes you through complete wilderness, pristine forests, and remote villages, offering the chance to spot rare wildlife like the red panda and snow leopard.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Proper greeting and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Bhadrapur flight/ Taplejung by Jeep
itinerary.desc: Fly to Bhadrapur and drive to Taplejung through beautiful tea gardens.

itinerary.title: Trek Taplejung to Mitlung
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through cardamom fields and along Tamor River.

itinerary.title: Trek Mitlung to Chiruwa
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through mixed forests to Siwa Bazar and Chiruwa.

itinerary.title: Trek Chiruwa to Lelep
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk along Tamor River with views of religious stones.

itinerary.title: Trek Lelep to Ela danda
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through dense forest to panoramic view point.

itinerary.title: Trek Ela Danda to Selep Kharka
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through red panda habitat and rhododendron forest.

itinerary.title: Trek Selep Kharka to Olangchung Gola
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk along Tamor River to the ancient village of Olangchung Gola.

itinerary.title: Trek Olangchung Gola to Upper Langmale Kharka
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk through complete wilderness and pine forests.

itinerary.title: Trek Upper Langmale Kharka to Pass Camp
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk along river side. Spotting snow leopards is possible here.

itinerary.title: Trek Pass camp to Yak Kharka via Lumba Sumba Pass
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour trek crossing 5200m pass. Views of eastern Nepal ranges.

itinerary.title: Trek Yak Kharka to Thudam
itinerary.desc: 6 hour descent back to civilization.

itinerary.title: Trek Thudam to Kharka
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk with panoramic views of Makalu range.

itinerary.title: Trek Kharka to Chyamthang
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk descending to Arun River and climbing to Chyamthang.

itinerary.title: Trek Chyamthang to Hatiya
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk through rhododendron forest to Gimber village.

itinerary.title: Trek Hatiya to Gola
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk after lunch to Gola camp site.

itinerary.title: Trek Gola to Ghadi
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk through agricultural lands.

itinerary.title: Trek Gadhi to Num and drive to Tumlingtar
itinerary.desc: 3 hour walk to Arun River and 4 hour drive to Tumlingtar.

itinerary.title: Fly back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 35 minute scenic flight back to the capital.

itinerary.title: Final departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to international airport.

title: TREK TO KANCHENJUNGA BASE CAMP
tagline: The Five Treasures of the Snow
description: The Kanchenjunga Base Camp trek is a legendary journey to the foot of the world's third highest mountain (8,586m). This remote trek in eastern Nepal takes you through diverse landscapes, from tropical lowlands to high alpine glaciers. You will visit both the North and South Base Camps, crossing challenging passes and experiencing the unique culture of the Limbu and Tibetan communities.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu Airport
itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Flight Kathmandu to Bhadrapur — Drive to Ilam
itinerary.desc: Scenic flight and drive to the famous tea plantations.

itinerary.title: Drive from Ilam to Taplejung
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours drive through beautiful countryside.

itinerary.title: Trek from Taplejung to Mitlung
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through lush mid hills and traditional villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Mitlung to Chiruwa
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek through Limbu and Tamang villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chiruwa to Sukathum
itinerary.desc: 5 hour walk alongside Tamor River and Ghunsa Khola.

itinerary.title: Trek from Sukathum to Amjilosa
itinerary.desc: 6 hour steep climb on exposed terrain to Tibetan village.

itinerary.title: Trek from Amjilosa to Gyabla
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through forested trail with waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Trek from Gyabla to Ghunsa
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through meadows to the large wooden village.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization day
itinerary.desc: Hike with 400m gain. Visit monasteries and learn Buddhist culture.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghunsa to Khangpachen
itinerary.desc: 7 hour walk with stunning views of the north face of Jannu (7710m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Khangpachen to Lhonak
itinerary.desc: 7 hour walk along Kanchenjunga Glacier to 4780m.

itinerary.title: Trek from Lhonak to Kanchenjunga Base Camp
itinerary.desc: 3 hour hike to Pang Pema for mesmerizing views of Mt Kanchenjunga.

itinerary.title: Trek from Base Camp to Ghunsa
itinerary.desc: 8 hour long descent retracing steps to Ghunsa.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghunsa to High Camp
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour steep rocky trail through colorful forests.

itinerary.title: Trek from High Camp to Tseram via Sele -La Pass
itinerary.desc: 8 hour challenging crossing of Sele La (4480m) and Sinion La (4660m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Tseram to Ramche
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hour walk along Yalung Glacier. Spot blue sheep.

itinerary.title: Explore to Yalung Base Camp
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hour excursion to Oktang for panoramic views of Jannu.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ramche to Anda Phedi
itinerary.desc: 5 hour descent through glacial moraines.

itinerary.title: Trek from Anda Phedi to Tortong
itinerary.desc: 5 hour walk through dense rhododendron forest.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tortong to Yamphudim
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour descent to mixed community village.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yamphudim to Khebang
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through valleys and waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Trek from Khebang to Khanidingbe
itinerary.desc: Walk with Kanchenjunga background through lushly forested trail.

itinerary.title: Drive Khanidingbe to Birtamod by jeep
itinerary.desc: Long drive from mountains to the flatlands of Nepal.

itinerary.title: Drive to Bhadrapur and fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return flight to the capital.

itinerary.title: Final departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to TIA for flight home.

title: MAKALU BASE CAMP
tagline: The Garden of the Great Black One
description: The trek to Makalu Base Camp is an outstanding journey into the heart of the Himalayas. Mount Makalu (8,485m) is the world's 5th highest mountain, and its base camp offers a breathtaking panorama of Everest, Lhotse, and Baruntse. The trek passes through the Makalu-Barun National Park, one of the world's richest biodiversity zones, and involves crossing high alpine passes like Shipton La (4,210m).

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit World Heritage sites: Durbar Square, Pashupatinath, Swayambhunath.

itinerary.title: Fly to Tumlingtar and drive to Chichira
itinerary.desc: 50 min flight and 3-4 hour drive to small Gurung settlement.

itinerary.title: Chichira to Num
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk through picturesque villages and lush forests.

itinerary.title: Num to Seduwa
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour steep descent to Barun River and ascent.

itinerary.title: Seduwa to Tashigaon
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour hike with breathtaking Himalayan panorama.

itinerary.title: Tashigaon to Khongma Danda
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour tough day walking on steep trails at higher elevation.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization/Rest
itinerary.desc: Bodily rest before crossing Shipton La.

itinerary.title: Khongma Danda to Dobate
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour climb over Shipton La and Keke La passes.

itinerary.title: Dobate to Yangri Kharka
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk through rhododendron forests to Barun River.

itinerary.title: Yangri Kharka to Langmale Kharka
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk past yak pastures and boulder fields.

itinerary.title: Langmale Kharka to Makalu Base Camp
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour trek to Shershong and the base camp (4870m).

itinerary.title: Explore Makalu Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Explore Barun Glacier and views of Everest and Lhotse.

itinerary.title: Makalu Base Camp to Yangri Kharka
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour descent retracing steps.

itinerary.title: Yangri Kharka to Dobate
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour descent through rock falls and green forests.

itinerary.title: Dobate to Khongma Danda
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek crossing high passes in reverse.

itinerary.title: Khongma Danda to Tashigaon
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour frequent long descent.

itinerary.title: Tashigaon to Seduwa
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour walk exiting national park.

itinerary.title: Seduwa to Num
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through lush forests.

itinerary.title: Num to Tumlingtar
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour return leg of the trek.

itinerary.title: Tumlingtar to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 50 min flight back to the capital.

itinerary.title: Final departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for departure flight.

title: SHERPANI COL HIGH PASS
tagline: The Most Challenging High-Pass Trek in Nepal
description: The Sherpani Col trek is arguably the most difficult and technical high-altitude trek in Nepal. It involves crossing three of the highest passes in the world: Sherpani Col (6,135m), West Col (6,143m), and Amphu Labsta (5,845m). This expedition-style trek links the Makalu and Everest regions, passing through remote valleys and over massive glaciers. It requires serious physical fitness and technical trekking skills.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Proper greeting and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu valley sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit UNESCO heritage sites.

itinerary.title: Fly to Tumlingtar
itinerary.desc: 50 min flight with views of Langtang and Everest.

itinerary.title: Trek to Mani-Bhanjyang
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through farm fields and villages.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chichila
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through rhododendron and Sal trees.

itinerary.title: Trek to Num
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk with 3 hour ascent and river descent.

itinerary.title: Trek to Seduwa
itinerary.desc: 5 hour walk descending through cornfields.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tashi Gaun
itinerary.desc: 3-4 hour easy walk through rural farm villages.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kahuma Danda
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour very hard day on real steep trails.

itinerary.title: Trek to Mumbuk
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk with views of Chamlang and Peak 6.

itinerary.title: Trek to Nehe Kharka
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk through steep gullies and glacial valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to Sherson
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk into alpine tundra with views of Pyramid Peak.

itinerary.title: Free day at Sherson
itinerary.desc: Full day rest for acclimatization. Excursion for Everest views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Barun-che Base Camp
itinerary.desc: 2-3 hour hike to isolated area at snout of Barun glacier.

itinerary.title: Trek to High Camp
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour walk below Makalu west pillar.

itinerary.title: Camp at 5700m
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour steep climb up rocky slopes.

itinerary.title: Rest day
itinerary.desc: Important acclimatization before hard high climb.

itinerary.title: Camp on the Moraine after crossing Sherpani col
itinerary.desc: Climb icy snout of Sherpani Glacier with fixed ropes.

itinerary.title: Trek to Panch Pokhari
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour walk over rocky glacier to 'five ponds'.

itinerary.title: Trek to Amphu Labtsa Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Prepare and fix ropes on difficult sections.

itinerary.title: Traverse Amphu Labtsa Pass and trek to Chhukung
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hour walk over top of pass (5780m) to ablation valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tyangboche
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk through meadows with summit views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour walk descending to Dudh Koshi.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lukla
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour walk back to the mountain airstrip.

itinerary.title: Fly back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return flight to the capital.

itinerary.title: Departures from Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport and wave goodbye.

title: UPPER MUSTANG
tagline: The Last Forbidden Kingdom
description: High-altitude desert region bordering Tibet. Ancient monasteries and medieval walled cities. The Upper Mustang trek offers a chance to explore the ancient walled capital of Lo Manthang, mysterious sky caves in cliff faces, and untouched Tibetan Buddhist culture.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour bus drive. Explore lakeside and Phewa lake.

itinerary.title: Fly to Jomsom and trek to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: 20 min flight and 3 hour trek alongside Kali Gandaki.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chele
itinerary.desc: Climb through ridges and reach north to Tangbe and Chele (3050m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Syangbochen
itinerary.desc: Gradual descent to Samar and climb over passes to 3800m.

itinerary.title: Trek to Ghami
itinerary.desc: Gently hike uphill to Geling and reach trail junction to Ghami.

itinerary.title: Trek to Charang
itinerary.desc: Tiring trek in rough terrain rewarded with remote countryside views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lo-Manthang
itinerary.desc: Reach the major attraction. Visit ancient temples and the King's palace.

itinerary.title: Exploration of Lo-Manthang
itinerary.desc: Visit Namgyal Gompa, Tingkhar village and Champa Lhakang.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dhamkar
itinerary.desc: Upper highland trail with views of Charang Valley and snowy mounts.

itinerary.title: Trek down to Syangbochen
itinerary.desc: Hike down with views of Dhaulagiri and Nilgiri.

itinerary.title: Trek to Chhusang
itinerary.desc: Trail through steep ridges and hills to upper village (2980m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Jomsom
itinerary.desc: Pass through Jharkot village and visit its ancient fortress.

itinerary.title: Fly to Pokhara and rest
itinerary.desc: 20 min flight. Rest and lakeside city exploration.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Scenic bus ride back to the capital.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Drop to airport for your flight home.

title: AMA DABLAM BASE CAMP
tagline: An exciting Trekking experience
description: Hiking the Ama Dablam Base Camp - Sagarmatha National Park This is the classic trek. We hike through the Khumbu region to see Sherpa culture and the incredible view of Mount Everest, Ama Dablam including many 8000-meter peaks. During our hike We follow in the footsteps of famous mountaineers. Sagarmatha National Park, known as the Khumbu, is in the northeastern region of Nepal. Mount Everest is the highest mountain in the world at an altitude of 8,848m. Ama Dablam, Pumori, and Nuptse tower above us making this a magical and inspiring place to visit. We include visits to Sherpa villages and Buddhist monasteries at Pangboche and Tengboche. You will meet Sherpas and get to know about their way of life and the Buddhist religion.

itinerary.title: ARRIVE IN KATHMANDU (1,400M)
itinerary.desc: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: EXPLORE KATHMANDU
itinerary.desc: A day for sightseeing around the Kathmandu valley and trek preparation.

itinerary.title: FLY TO LUKLA (2,840M), TREK TO PHAKDING (2,610M)
itinerary.desc: Scenic flight to Lukla and begin the trek following the Dudh Koshi river.

itinerary.title: TREK TO NAMCHE BAZAAR (3,445M)
itinerary.desc: Hike through pine forests and cross suspension bridges to reach the Sherpa capital.

itinerary.title: ACCLIMATISING WALKS AROUND NAMCHE BAZAAR
itinerary.desc: Health break to adjust to the altitude with optional hikes to Everest View Point.

itinerary.title: TREK TO TENGBOCHE (3,860M)
itinerary.desc: Walk to the famous Tengboche monastery with stunning views of Everest and Ama Dablam.

itinerary.title: TREK TO PANGBOCHE (3,930M), AFTERNOON EXPLORE THE VILLAGE
itinerary.desc: Trek to one of the oldest Sherpa settlements in the region.

itinerary.title: DAY WALK TO AMA DABLAM BASE CAMP (4,570M)
itinerary.desc: Reach the base of the spectacular Ama Dablam peak for panoramic views.

itinerary.title: TREK TO KENJUMA (3,550M)
itinerary.desc: Descending back through beautiful landscapes towards Kenjuma.

itinerary.title: TREK TO MONJO (2,610M)
itinerary.desc: Continue the descent along the river towards the village of Monjo.

itinerary.title: TREK TO LUKLA (2,840M)
itinerary.desc: The final day of trekking back to Lukla airport.

itinerary.title: FLY TO KATHMANDU, TRANSFER TO YOUR HOTEL
itinerary.desc: Return flight to the capital and transfer to your accommodation.

title: EVEREST BASE CAMP AND KALA PATTHAR
tagline: An exciting Trekking experience
description: The Everest Base Camp Trek is a challenge, 14 days of walking, high altitudes, rocky tracks, and some steep inclines, but what an achievement to say you reached the base camp of the highest mountain in the world. The path begins in ancient Kathmandu, where you'll acclimate and explore the city at your leisure while expecting your ascent. Your trek to Everest Base Camp world's tallest mountain will bring you over suspension bridges spanning chasms of thin air, through hidden Buddhist monasteries, and into the heart of the warm, rugged Sherpa culture.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu (1,300m/4,264ft)
itinerary.desc: We will welcome you at the airport and drop you to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Fly Kathmandu—Lukla and trek to Phakding (2,562m /8700ft)
itinerary.desc: Early morning, fly to Lukla for 35 minutes. The trail starts along the side of the Dudh Koshi valley before ascending to Ghat Trail climbs gently again about an hour to final destination Phakding.

itinerary.title: Phakding - Namche Bazaar (3,440 m/11,280 ft)
itinerary.desc: Trek leads through a beautiful pine forest, along Dudh Koshi River crossing many suspension bridges via Sherpa villages Benkar, Chimoa, Monjo and Jorsole national park permit checkpoint with the tranquility view of glistering Mt. Thamserku.

itinerary.title: Namche Bazaar: Acclimatization and exploration day
itinerary.desc: Today will be spent resting and allowing your bodies to become acclimatized to the lofty altitude. There’s an optional 2 hour hike to Everest View Point, an uphill walk that will help speed acclimatization. Otherwise, spend the day exploring Namche Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Namche Bazzar - Tengboche (3,870m/12,694ft)
itinerary.desc: Breathtaking views of the Himalayas - Everest, Nuptse, Lhotse, Ama Dablam, Thamserku and Kwangde - are some of the highlights of the day.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tengboche to Pheriche (4312m)
itinerary.desc: The trail starts with a steep descent through woods towards a suspension bridge over the Imja Khola River. Then you begin a steady climb up to Pheriche via Pangboche, which houses the most ancient monastery in the region.

itinerary.title: Acclimatisation day in Pheriche (4312m)
itinerary.desc: As it is important to ascend slowly you'll spend another day acclimatizing. There are many day hikes you can take from here, or you can simply have a day of rest.

itinerary.title: Trek from Pheriche to Lobuche (4920m)
itinerary.desc: The trail continues up the wide valley beneath the impressive peaks of Cholatse (6440m) and Tawoche (6542m). Afterward, the climb gets steeper to reach the foot of the Khumbu glacier.

itinerary.title: Lobuche - Gorak Shep - Everest Base Camp (5,364 m)
itinerary.desc: On the way to our destination, we’ll approach the famed Khumbu Glacier and icefall, located on the slopes of Everest.

itinerary.title: Gorak Shep - Kala Patthar (5,545 m) - Pheriche (4,280 m)
itinerary.desc: A very early morning climb of 2-3 hours up Kala Patthar offers a sunrise awakening of the Himalayan chain. First Everest then its surrounding vassals: Pumori, Lingtren, Khumbutse, Changtse, Lhotse and Nuptse.Plus Cho Oyo in the west and Ama Dablam to the south.

itinerary.title: Pheriche – Namche Bazaar (3,440 m)
itinerary.desc: Today a long descent leads to Phunki Thenga on the Imja Khola. The path then climbs to Sanasa beyond which it broadens for the pleasant contour walk back to Namche Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Namche Bazaar – Lukla (2,642m)
itinerary.desc: From Namche, the trail descends to more comfortable altitudes, passing through the friendly farming villages, crossing the suspension bridge at Thado Koshi before rising to Ghat and Cheplung.

itinerary.title: Lukla – Kathmandu (1,300m)
itinerary.desc: After an early breakfast, take the return flight to Kathmandu. Transfer to your hotel.

itinerary.title: Final Trek departure
itinerary.desc: After breakfast, transfer to international airport and fly to onward destination.

title: EVEREST PIKEY PEAK
tagline: An exciting Trekking experience
description: Everest Pikey Peak Trek is the newly opened trekking destination near the lower Khumbu region. Pikey Peak Trekking is the best alternative to overcrowded trekking around the Everest Region. The trail follows the less crowded area with beautiful forest and high ridges enjoying the panoramic Himalayan scenery including Mount Everest, Kanchenjunga, Makalu, Lhotse, Manaslu, Annapurna and many other snow covered peaks, mountain glaciers, green pine and rhododendron forests, highly culture influenced villages, holy monasteries, prayer walls and Holy lake dukunda. You can see breathtaking sunrise and sunset views from the top of this peak.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu (1,300m/4,264ft)
itinerary.desc: We will welcome you at the airport and drop you to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Dhap (2900m)
itinerary.desc: Today you will drive from Kathmandu to Dhap by Bus for 8-9 hours passing through rhododendron forest. You will explore Dhap town in the evening.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dhap to Jhapre (2930m)
itinerary.desc: Today, you'll start the easy trek for about 5 hours to Jhapre village.The trail follows a road under construction for the ﬁrst couple of hours perched above a deep valley with nice views of Everest and Numbur Himal. We will visit local Monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Jhapre to Pikey Peak (3600m)
itinerary.desc: We will wake up in the early morning to view the first golden rays of the sun falling on the silver lining of snow-capped mountains. Relishing the view, we will start walking uphill to Bhulbule. The trail climbs through the Rhododendron forest coming to Yak pasture. Cross the long Mane wall and climb further to Pikey peak base camp.

itinerary.title: Trek from Pikey Peak to Junbeshi (2390m)
itinerary.desc: Climb along the rocky ridge to the Pikey peak (4,065 m). The top unveils wide range of the snow peaks from Dhaulagiri in the west till Kanchanjunga in the west. View of Mt Everest, Thamsherku, Numbur Himal, Kangtega is the highlight. From the apex climb down to Lamjura pass and further to Junbesi.

itinerary.title: Trek from Junbesi to Phaplu (2380m)
itinerary.desc: Today we will follow the descending dusty trail along the Junbesi Khola until reaching a steel suspension bridge. On crossing the bridge we will reach Beni Ghat. We will continue our walk along the trail filled with scenic pleasures before reaching Phaplu. We can explore the area as we bid farewell to the Rolwaling region.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu(1400m)
itinerary.desc: Today you will drive back to Kathmandu by jeep for 9/10 hours.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Today we will drop you to the airport and wave you goodbye.

title: EVEREST (3 HIGH PASSES)
tagline: An exciting Trekking experience
description: The three pass trek in Nepal offers the ultimate and complete trekking experience in the Everest region. It is a purely a challenging trekking adventure in Nepal. Obviously it crosses 3 high passes linking the four distinct valleys of Bhotekoshi, Gokyo, Khumbu and Imja Tse. Crossing the rugged high passes of Renjo La (5388 m), Cho La (5380 m) and Kongma La (5535m) with climbing of the three peaks of Gokyo Ri (5483m), Kalapathar (5545m) and Chukung (5550m) along with the hike to Everest base camp makes this 3 pass trek unforgettable trekking experience in Nepal. If you are a true adventure seeker and wish to do a challenging trek in the Everest region, then Everest Three pass trek is the ideal choice for you. Since it involves crossing high passes in the Everest region, you had to be physically fit for the trek.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu Airport(1360m)
itinerary.desc: After your arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport Kathmandu, you will be warmly greeted by our office representative and transferred to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Flight to Lukla (2840m) and trek to Phakding(2,652m)
itinerary.desc: A scenic flight to Lukla, then we head up the Dudh Koshi Valley on a well-marked trail.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazar(3,440m)
itinerary.desc: After breakfast at Phakding, we set out for the mountain junction town of Namche; we cross and re-cross the river on high airy suspension bridges. We then take a steep hike to Namche.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day
itinerary.desc: To acclimatize, you visit Khunde Hospital set-up by Sir Edmund Hillary or take a one hour walk up to the Everest View Hotel above Namche for the sunset view of Ama Dablam, Nuptse, Lhotse, and Everest. We then go to Khumjung where we visit a school established by Hillary.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tengboche(3,860m)
itinerary.desc: we start our trek towards Tengboche enjoying superb view of Mt. Everest, Nuptse, Lhotse, Ama Dablam and close up view of Thamserku. The trail goes gradually down up to Kyangjuma. After having a relaxed lunch at Phunki Tenga, we have a little tough climb steep up through the pine forests while before we reach Tengboche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dingboche(4,360m)
itinerary.desc: We choose the upper trail for better views to visit Pangboche village and its ancient Monastery. We enjoy lunch with fantastic close-up views of Ama-Dablam. In the afternoon, go north to Pheriche or take the eastward trail beneath the towering north face of Ama Dablam. we descend into the river and begin the last and steepest climb of the day up to Dingboche.

itinerary.title: Trek Chhukung(4,750m)
itinerary.desc: The trek goes through Imja Khola valley and sublime alpine landscapes, and some stone-walled fields. On the trail, we will also have spectacular mountain views of Mt. Lhotse, Mt. Ama Dablam and Island Peak.

itinerary.title: Rest Day
itinerary.desc: Today we will do a day trip to Nagarjun hillock. From Nagarjun we have great views of Lobuche East, Lobuche West, Lobuche peak, Thamserku, Kangtega and Amadablam. We then descend back to Chhukung.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lobuche(4,940m) via Kongma La Pass(5,535m)
itinerary.desc: Just after some walk, we see great views of Island peak valley and jagged ridge of Amphu Lapcha. Behind us is the landscape of icy lakes ahead down of which is the Khumbu Glacier. The final descent is the toughest stage of the trek today, upon climbing the moraine on the far side, the trail turns north through Khumbu Glacier which culminates at Lobuche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Everest Base camp(5,364) – Gorakshep(5,170m)
itinerary.desc: Today we climb through meadows and moraine stones steps to reach Gorakshep, by either climbing to Kalapathar or continue heading to Everest base camp. From Kalapathar, we get to see the entire south face of Mt. Everest and well-known peaks nearby; this also includes great sights of the skyline of the Tibet plateau.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lobuche(4,940m) via Kalapather(5,545m)
itinerary.desc: Today we trek to get remarkable views of the sunshine gleaming on the face of Everest from Kalapathar. On reaching the peak of Kalapathar, we will have unbelievable views of the mountains that you will see only once in your lifetime. We return to the Lobuche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dzongla(4,830m)
itinerary.desc: Chola Lake spread below Mt Cholaste is a view to observe on our route. The lakes will give us a fresh view. Then after an hour of walk, we reach Dzongla.

itinerary.title: Trek to Gokyo(4,800m) via Chola pass(5,368m)
itinerary.desc: The trip today is a little harder than earlier. We can have the enchanting view of the Chola Lake and the Ama Dablam which appears over a range of mountains in the south and Cholaste soars on the west.

itinerary.title: Rest Day
itinerary.desc: On the day, we will take rest on the Gokyo village and have the view of enchanting sites of Gokyo village. If the day is favorable then we can climb Gokyo Ri and enjoy the view of clear Everest Region.

itinerary.title: Trek to Marlung(4,210m) via Renjo La(5,360m)
itinerary.desc: We will turn to the Renjo-La trail by Dudh Pokhari. After a walk of about 3 hours, we can reach Renjo-La where we can see the highest peak in the world Mt.Everest (8,848m), Mt Lhotse (8,516m), Mt. Cholaste (6,440m) and Mt. Tabuche (6,542m) smiling at us.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche Bazar(3600m)
itinerary.desc: we can see some eye-catching view of some mountains namely Thamserku, Katenga, Kusum Kangguru, etc. We can also see a monastery called Khari Goma you can find Laudo monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lukla
itinerary.desc: We trek to Lukla along the Dudh Koshi River. The trail goes steeply downward with rocky terrain. We pass through the rhododendron, pine and oaks forest and several snow-covered peaks.

itinerary.title: Fly back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: We take a scenic flight from Lukla to Kathmandu for about forty-five minutes. And then transfer to your hotel for refreshment.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.desc: Today, we drop you to the international airport to fly back to your home.

title: TREK TO PHAPLU EVEREST BASE CAMP
tagline: An exciting Trekking experience
description: Phaplu Everest Base Camp trek is alternative trekking in the Everest region. Phaplu EBC trek is an extra adventurous and less crowded route. It also offers sufficient time to acclimatize you before reaching Lukla. This Everest Base Camp trek via Phaplu is popular for its Sherpa villages, monasteries and culture, fabulous sceneries and social life of Sherpa villages are another attraction of this region. We follow the “milk river” north through terraced hillsides and small villages to join the main Everest trail below Lukla. The route passes through Lush valleys with abundant flora and fauna, spectacular forests of blooming rhododendron in March.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu (Altitude: 1350)
itinerary.desc: Upon your arrival at Kathmandu International Airport, we will pick up you and transfer you to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu City sightseeing
itinerary.desc: After your delightful breakfast, we will introduce you with a guide and take you to UNESCO Heritages sites of the valley.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Phaplu (Altitude: 2413m/7962 ft. Drive: 14 hrs)
itinerary.desc: After having a delightful breakfast, our guide will receive you for a drive to Phaplu. Spend overnight at local lodges.

itinerary.title: Rest day (Altitude: 2413m/7962 ft)
itinerary.desc: After our drive from Kathmandu to Phaplu, we will get a full day to rest at Phaplu. Spend overnight at a local lodge.

itinerary.title: Trek to Nuntala (Altitude: 2230 m/7359 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: Today, our trek starts with a gently ascend towards Takshindo-la pass, from where we can view some mountains including Thamserku, Kantega, Kusum, Kangaru and Mera Peak. Then we will steep downhill to Nunthala. Spend overnight at a local lodge.

itinerary.title: Trek to Bupsa (Altitude: 2730 m/ 9010 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: After breakfast, we will start walking downhill through the Dudh Koshi River and cross a suspension bridge of 109 m long. Then, climb up to the village jumbling through the field of barley, wheat, and corn. The trail continues to ascend till you reach the village of Khari Khola. Here, we will cross a wooden bridge and continue to walk in an uphill trail where we can see some water-driven mills. We will then reach to Bupsa where we will spend our overnight.

itinerary.title: Trek to Phakding (Altitude: 2610 m/8613 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: Following the up and down trail crossing several villages and suspension bridges following Dudh Koshi River, we will reach Phakding. Spend overnight at a local lodge.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche (Altitude; 3440 m/11352 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: The trek chases the northern trial up the Dudh Kosi valley to Monjo. Continuing the trail along the steep uphill climb while savoring the first glimpse of Everest; we will arrive at Namche Bazaar. Spend our overnight at a local lodge.

itinerary.title: Rest day in Namche (Altitude; 3440 m/11352 ft)
itinerary.desc: Today is a day to acclimatize with higher elevation. On this day, we can go for a short hike to Khumjung, a beautiful settlement of Hospitable Sherpas. We can enjoy the best view of the Mt. Everest and other high mountains of the Everest Region.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tengboche (Altitude: 3860 m/ 12738 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: After a delightful breakfast in Namche, we will walk on the side of the valley above the Dudh Koshi River, passing by several villages and many tea shops, we will descend steeply to a bridge over the river at Phunki Tenga. We will get the first view of spectacular mountains including Mt. Everest, Ama Dablam, Lhotse Shar, Tawache, Kangtega, Thamserkhu, Nuptse. Once we reach Tengbocbe, we can explore the Khumbu largest monastery- the Tengboche Monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dingboche (Altitude: 4410 m/14553 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: After our morning breakfast, we will start our trail passing through lush forests of birch and rhododendron trees. On the trail, we can have mesmerizing views of Mt. Everest, Lhotse, and Ama Dablam. We can slowly steep down to Deboche, then cross the Imja River to Pangboche. Ascend toward the upper Pangboche, we will visit one of the oldest monastery of Khumbu- the Pangboche Monastery. We will continue our hike to the Imja Valley and Lobuche River on the way to Dingboche.

itinerary.title: Rest day for acclimatization (Altitude: 4410 m/14553 ft)
itinerary.desc: Today, considering our physical fitness, they will take us to Chhukung valley following the Imja River. From here, we can view the stunning mountains and Glacier lakes including Island Peak (6189m), Amphulapche (5663m), Lhotse Shar (8382m) and Lhotse (8516m). The main aim of today is to acclimatize properly for more challenging days onwards.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lobuche [4930m] (Altitude: 4910 m/16203 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: Today, our trek will continue up the village from where we can enjoy the mountains, including Mt. Makalu. We will take a steep climb towards the foot of the Khumbu Glacier and reach at Dugla. Then, we will walk on the trail zigzags up through the boulders of the glacier’s terminal moraine. The path then climbs gently along the glacier to reach the cluster of houses at Lobuche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Everest Base Camp, back to Gorakshep
itinerary.desc: On the way to Gorekshep, we will witness the north ridge of Mt. Everest, Mt. Pumori, Mt. Mahalangur, Mt. Nuptse and many more. Further climbing through the Changri Glacier, we can have a first glimpse of Kalapatthar. Once we reach base camp, we can see the deadliest route to Everest that makes the journey more adventurous. We will get to explore quality time in the base camp and surrounding areas and return to Gorak Shep to spend the night.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kalapatthar (5550 m), back to Dughla (4620 m)
itinerary.desc: Next to Everest Base camp, this day is too exciting and adventurous hiking to Kalapatthar. We will catch the sparkling yellowish snowcapped over the mountains. Then we will return to Gorekshep with a refreshing mood and descend back towards Dugla.

itinerary.title: Trek to Pangboche (Altitude: 3930 m/12970 ft. Trek: 5/6 hrs)
itinerary.desc: Today, we will mostly trek downhill. As we retrace our steps from Duglha, we will descend to Pheriche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Namche (Altitude: 3440 m/11352 ft. Trek: 4/5 hrs)
itinerary.desc: It will be the steep down having an eye-catching view of Everest, Kwangde, Tawache, Nuptse, Lhotse, Ama Dablam, Kantega and Thamserkhu. Overnight will refresh us at Namche.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lukla (Altitude: 2840/ 9372 ft. Trek: 4/5 hrs)
itinerary.desc: Today is the final day of the trek. We will walk following the Dudh Koshi River down to Lukla.

itinerary.title: Flight to Kathmandu (Altitude: 1350/4428 ft. Flight: 30 minutes)
itinerary.desc: Today we will fly back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Departure transfer
itinerary.desc: Today is the day of your departure carrying lots of adventurous memories of the Everest Base Camp trek. We will drop you to the airport 3 hours before your flight.

title: WESTERN NEPAL TO KAILASH TIBET TREK
tagline: The Ultimate Trans-Himalayan Frontier
description: This extraordinary trek starts in the remote district of Humla in Far Western Nepal and crosses into Tibet to reach the sacred Mt. Kailash. You will experience the rugged beauty of the Karnali river valley, cross high passes like Nara Lagna (4,580m), and witness the profound spirituality of Lake Manasarovar and Mt. Kailash. The journey concludes with a scenic drive across the Tibetan plateau to Lhasa.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu day tour and chinese Visa process
itinerary.desc: Visit UNESCO heritage sites and obtain Chinese visa.

itinerary.title: Fly to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: 55 minute afternoon flight. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Fly to Simikot and Trek to Dharapuri
itinerary.desc: 45 minute flight to Simikot (2960m). Trek to Dharapuri (2300m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Salli Khola
itinerary.desc: Trek past Chachera waterfall and Kermi village to Salli Khola (2700m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Muchu
itinerary.desc: Cross Karnali river and sandy meadows to reach Muchu (2920m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Sipsip
itinerary.desc: Climb through rock-filled gullies and mustard fields to Sipsip (4330m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Hilsa
itinerary.desc: Cross Nara Lagna pass (4580m) and descend to Hilsa (3720m) on the border.

itinerary.title: Drive to Taklakot and Manasarovar
itinerary.desc: Cross border and drive to the sacred Lake Manasarovar (4560m).

itinerary.title: At Manasarovar
itinerary.desc: Acclimatization day. Visit Chiu Monastery on the lake shore.

itinerary.title: Drive to Tarboche
itinerary.desc: Drive to the starting point of the Kailash Kora (4750m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Dirapuk
itinerary.desc: Trek through Lha Chu valley with spectacular waterfalls to Dirapuk (4900m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Zutulpuk
itinerary.desc: Cross the high Drolma La pass (5630m). Visit Lake of Compassion.

itinerary.title: Trek to Darchen
itinerary.desc: Final day of Kora through an impressive gorge to Darchen (4560m).

itinerary.title: Drive to Paryang
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive crossing Mayun-la pass to Paryang (4750m).

itinerary.title: Drive to Saga
itinerary.desc: Continue drive to Saga (4600m) near Brahmaputra River.

itinerary.title: Drive to Shigatse
itinerary.desc: Drive through valleys to Tibet's second largest city (3900m).

itinerary.title: Sightseeing and drive to Gyantse
itinerary.desc: Visit Tashilhunpo Monastery and explore Gyantse Kumbum.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing and drive to Lhasa
itinerary.desc: Scenic drive past huge glaciers and Khamba La to Lhasa (3650m).

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in Lhasa
itinerary.desc: Visit Norbulingka and Jokhang Temple.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in Lhasa
itinerary.desc: Visit Potala Palace and Drepung Monastery.

itinerary.title: Lhasa to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Fly back to Kathmandu and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to TIA 3 hours before your flight.

title: JUMLA RARA LAKE
tagline: The Queen of Lakes Expedition
description: The trek to Rara Lake is a journey to Nepal's largest and deepest freshwater lake, situated in the remote Mugu district. This trek starts from Jumla, one of the most remote districts, and passes through pristine forests, traditional villages, and high mountain pastures. Rara Lake, known as the 'Queen of Lakes', offers a stunning turquoise blue expanse surrounded by snow-capped peaks and deep forests.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing and fly to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Visit UNESCO sites and take afternoon flight to the plains.

itinerary.title: Fly to Jumla
itinerary.desc: 20 minute scenic flight to the foothills (2540m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Jumla to Bumra
itinerary.desc: Ascend uphill and cross suspension bridges to Bumra (2850m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Bumra to Pina
itinerary.desc: Cross Ghurchi Lagna pass (3480m) and descend to Pina (2430m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Pina to Gamagadhi
itinerary.desc: Ascend steep trail to the headquarters of Mugu (2095m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Gamagadhi to Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Easy trail to the lake (3010m). Savor the fascinating beauty of nature.

itinerary.title: Explore Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Visit observation tower for fine views. Optional swimming in the lake.

itinerary.title: Trek from Rara Lake to Khatyar Khola Camp
itinerary.desc: Ascent through bamboo and birch forests to camp (2965m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Khatyar Khola Camp to Ghoro Singha
itinerary.desc: Pleasant trail along the ridge and descend Chuchemara Danda (3050m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghoro Singha to Sinja
itinerary.desc: Descend steep pass and forest to Sinja (2490m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Sinja to Chala Chaur
itinerary.desc: Trek along rock-strewn path amidst forest wilderness (2980m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Chala Chaur to Chauriya Chaur
itinerary.desc: Steady trail up to Jaljala chaur and pass (3580m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Chauriya Chaur to Jumla
itinerary.desc: Follow footprints back to Jumla town (2540m).

itinerary.title: Fly from Jumla to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Return scenic flight after a tiring walk.

itinerary.title: Trek from Nepalgunj to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Flight back to the capital and rest.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Final transfer to the airport.

title: API BASE CAMP
tagline: The Jewel of the Far West
description: Api Base Camp trek is a rare adventure to the foot of Mt. Api (7,132m), the highest peak in the Yoka Pahar section of the Himalayas in Far Western Nepal. This trek offers an incredible mix of natural beauty, from the Mahakali and Chameliya river valleys to high alpine plateaus. You will experience the unique culture of the local communities and witness stunning views of Mt. Api, Mt. Nampa, and Mt. Bobaye.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Pickup and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Dhangadhi
itinerary.desc: 15 min flight. Explore Aircraft museum and Botanical Garden.

itinerary.title: Dhangadhi to Gokuleshwar
itinerary.desc: 8 hour drive through Mahakali highway with Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Gokuleshwar to Latinath and Paribagar
itinerary.desc: 2 hour drive and 1 hour trek to beautiful village (1770m).

itinerary.title: Paribagar to Makarigadi
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek through traditional villages and forests (1470m).

itinerary.title: Makarigadi to Siti
itinerary.desc: 8 hour trek climbing up the gorge with spectacular views (2250m).

itinerary.title: Siti to Domal
itinerary.desc: 7 hour trek to sacred junction of two rivers (2950m).

itinerary.title: Domal to Dhaulo Odar
itinerary.desc: 5 hour steep trek to open grassland camp (3545m).

itinerary.title: Trek to Api base camp and back to Dhaulo Odar
itinerary.desc: 3 hour trek to base camp (3860m) and visit Holy Lake.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dhaulo Odar to Siti
itinerary.desc: 6 hour descent back to Siti village.

itinerary.title: Siti to Makrigaad
itinerary.desc: 6 hour descent through forests and agricultural fields.

itinerary.title: Makrigaad to Latinath and Gokuleshwar
itinerary.desc: 4 hour trek and 2 hour drive back to the basic lodge.

itinerary.title: Gokuleshwar to Dhangadi
itinerary.desc: 9 hour bus drive back to the plains.

itinerary.title: Dhangadi to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 1 hour 15 min flight back to the capital.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for safe flight.

title: TSUM VALLEY
tagline: A Journey into the Hidden Valley of Happiness
description: The Tsum Valley is a sacred Himalayan pilgrimage valley situated in northern Gorkha, Nepal. 'Tsum' comes from the Tibetan word 'Tsombo', which means vivid. Traditionally Tsum valley was a currently distinct geographical area called 'Tsum Tso Chuksum', which means thirteen provinces ruled as a single territory. The ancient remains of the Tsum Kingdom are still visible today. Due to its remoteness and inaccessibility, this sacred valley and its people have been bypassed by modern development for centuries. As a result, the unique culture of this valley has remained intact.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kathmandu & Transfer to Hotel
itinerary.desc: Welcome at Tribhuvan International Airport (TIA) and transfer to your booked hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Soti Khola
itinerary.desc: 8-9 hours scenic drive west through middle hills to Soti Khola via Arughat.

itinerary.title: Trek from Soti Khola to Maccha Khola
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours trek along Budhi Gandaki River, passing Labubesi and views of Ganesh Himal.

itinerary.title: Trek from Maccha Khola to Jagat
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours walk. Visit Tatopani hot springs and cross suspension bridges over Budhi Gandaki.

itinerary.title: Trek from Jagat to Chisopani
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hours trek through Philim and forests with views of the narrowing valley.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chisopani to Chumling
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours. Enter Tsum Valley, climb through pine forests with views of Himalchuli and Boudha Himal.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chumling to Chokhangparo
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hours. Views of Ganesh Himal. Visit old Chumling gompa and stone village streets.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chokhangparo to Nile
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hours. Visit Rachen Gompa and pass through Lar, Phurba and Pangdun villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Nile to Mu Gompa
itinerary.desc: 3 hours trek close to Tibetan border. Visit Mu Gompa and Dhephu Doma Gompa.

itinerary.title: Mu Gompa Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Explore the largest and most remote monastery in the Tsum region and optional base of Pika Himal.

itinerary.title: Trek from Mu Gompa to Burgi Village via Milarepa cave
itinerary.desc: 5 hours. Visit Milarepa's Cave (Piren Phu) for glimpses of Poshyop Glacier.

itinerary.title: Trek from Burgi village to Chumling
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hours. Descend through Gho andSarpu Khola back to lower Tsum Valley.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chumling to Philim
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours. Enjoy Samba Falls and views of Ganesh Himal Base Camp route.

itinerary.title: Trek from Philim to Khorlabesi
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours. Descend to Jagat and Tatopani.

itinerary.title: Trek from Khorlabesi to Soti Khola
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hours. Retrace steps along Budhi Gandaki River and Labubesi waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Trek from Soti Khola to Arughat to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Walk 4 hours to Arughat and drive 7-8 hours back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to TIA for your onward flight.

title: TSUM VALLEY MANASLU CIRCUIT
tagline: The Ultimate Combined Himalayan Odyssey
description: The Tsum Valley Manaslu Circuit trek is a unique journey that combines the culturally rich and sacred Tsum Valley with the challenging and spectacular Manaslu Circuit. This trek offers a deep dive into Tibetan-influenced Buddhist culture, pristine landscapes, and the high-altitude adventure of crossing the Larkya La pass. You will explore ancient monasteries, remote villages, and witness breathtaking views of Mt. Manaslu (8,163m) and the Ganesh Himal range.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Full day tour of UNESCO World Heritage sites in Kathmandu valley.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Soti Khola
itinerary.desc: 8-hour drive via Dhading Bensi and Arughat.

itinerary.title: Soti Khola to Machha Khola
itinerary.desc: Trek along Budhi Gandaki river through beautiful forests.

itinerary.title: Macha Khola to Jagat
itinerary.desc: Pass through Khorlabeshi and Tatopani hot springs.

itinerary.title: Jagat to Lhakpa
itinerary.desc: Trek through Philim and climb to Lhakpa.

itinerary.title: Lhakpa to Chumling
itinerary.desc: Enter Tsum Valley through pine and rhododendron forests.

itinerary.title: Chumling to Chhokang-Paro
itinerary.desc: Experience Tibetan culture and views of Ganesh Himal.

itinerary.title: Trek to Nile
itinerary.desc: Visit the retreat of Monk Kongchog and ritual monasteries.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Mu Gompa and Dhephyudonma Gompa
itinerary.desc: Visit historical monasteries at the head of the valley.

itinerary.title: Trek to Rachen Gompa
itinerary.desc: Explore ancient gompas and study Buddhist religion.

itinerary.title: Trek to Gumba Lungdang
itinerary.desc: Walk through pine forests back towards Chhokang and Chumling.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Ganesh Himal Base Camp Hike
itinerary.desc: Challenging hike to 5000m for incredible views.

itinerary.title: Gumba Lungdang to Bhi
itinerary.desc: Cross the suspension bridge back into the main Manaslu route.

itinerary.title: Bhi to Namrung
itinerary.desc: Gain altitude with views of Manaslu North.

itinerary.title: Namrung to Lhogaon
itinerary.desc: Visit Honsansho Gompa and Pungen Glaciers.

itinerary.title: Lhogaon to Samagaon
itinerary.desc: Trek towards Peak 29 with lateral moraine views.

itinerary.title: Rest Day in Samagaon
itinerary.desc: Acclimatize and relax in the peaceful village.

itinerary.title: Manaslu Base camp Excursion
itinerary.desc: Side trip to 4800m for views of Manaslu Glacier and Birendra lake.

itinerary.title: Samagaon to Samdo
itinerary.desc: Trek to one of the most remote settlements near Tibet.

itinerary.title: Samdo to Dharamshala
itinerary.desc: Cross the tundra to the foot of Larkya glacier.

itinerary.title: Dharamshala to Larkya pass to Bhimthang
itinerary.desc: Cross the 5106m pass. Spectacular panorama of Himalayan peaks.

itinerary.title: Bimtang to Tilije
itinerary.desc: Descend through paddy fields and rhododendron forests.

itinerary.title: Tilije to Dharapani – Trek and drive to Beshisahar
itinerary.desc: Final trek and jeep drive back towards Beshisahar.

itinerary.title: Beshishahar to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return drive to the capital.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Final transfer to airport.

title: MANASLU CIRCUIT
tagline: The Spirit of the Mountain Odyssey
description: The Manaslu Circuit Trek is one of the most beautiful and challenging treks in Nepal. It offers a perfect alternative to the more crowded Annapurna Circuit. The trek circles the world's eighth highest mountain, Mt. Manaslu (8,163m), crossing the dramatic Larkya La pass (5,106m). You will experience a wide range of landscapes, from subtropical forests to high-altitude glaciers, and encounter diverse ethnic groups including the Gurungs and Tibetans.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel by tourist car.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Valley Tour
itinerary.desc: UNESCO world heritage sightseeing.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Soti-Khola
itinerary.desc: 8-hour drive enjoying hilly views and rivers.

itinerary.title: Trek from Soti Khola to Maccha Khola
itinerary.desc: 6-hour trek through forests and colorful villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Maccha Khola to Jagat
itinerary.desc: 8-hour trek. Visit popular Tatopani hot springs.

itinerary.title: Trek from Jagat to Phewa
itinerary.desc: 6-hour trek along unique boulders and pine forests.

itinerary.title: Trek from Phewa to Namrung
itinerary.desc: 6.5-hour trek through bamboo forest and landslide zones.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namrung to Lho
itinerary.desc: 4-hour trek exploring Tibet-influenced lifestyle and Mani walls.

itinerary.title: Trek from Lho to Sama Gong
itinerary.desc: 4-hour trek with amazing views of Mt. Manaslu and Ribung Gompa.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day at Sama Gaon
itinerary.desc: Excursion to Pungyen Gompa, Basecamp or Birendra Tal.

itinerary.title: Trek from Sama Gong to Samdo
itinerary.desc: 4-hour trek exploring nearby villages or Samdo Peak.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Excursion to Tibetan Border
itinerary.desc: Day trip to 5100m border point.

itinerary.title: Trek from Samdo to Dharamasala

The trek offers attractive vistas of dense jungles, mountains, and landscapes. Jaljala is one of the targeted destinations of trekkers so it is known as the Hidden Treasure as well from where view the entire range of high mountains.

tagline: The White Mountain Odyssey
description: The Dhaulagiri Circuit is a challenging camping trek that circles the massive White Mountain (Dhaulagiri). It involves crossing high-altitude glaciated passes like French Pass (5,360m) and Dhampus Pass (5,280m), offering incredible isolation and views of the world's 7th highest mountain.

description: This trek combines the beautiful Langtang Valley, also known as the Valley of Glaciers, with the sacred alpine lakes of Gosaikunda. The journey takes you through dense forests, traditional Tamang villages, and high mountain pastures, culminating in spectacular views from Laurebina La pass (4,610m).

tagline: A Cultural Encounter with the Tamang People
description: The Tamang Heritage Trail is a relatively new and culturally rich trekking route in the Langtang region. It offers a unique opportunity to experience the traditional lifestyle, customs, and culture of the Tamang people. The trek passes through beautiful villages, terraced fields, and offers panoramic views of the Ganesh and Langtang mountain ranges, along with the chance to relax in natural hot springs.

tagline: The Ruby Valley Wilderness
description: Trek through the untouched wilderness of the Ganesh Himal range, named after the elephant-headed Hindu deity. The journey takes you through traditional Tamang villages, mixed forests of rhododendron and pine, and over high passes like Shing La, offering spectacular views of the Great Himalayan Chain and the Tibetan mountain range.

Highlights include the spectacular Pangsang Pass (3,842m), traditional homestays in Tipliing and Shertung, and the chance to relax in natural hot springs, all set against the backdrop of the majestic Ganesh Himal range.

It combines the restricted valleys of Nar and Phu with the challenging crossing of the Teri-La Pass (5,595m) into the high-altitude desert of Upper Mustang. This trek offers unparalleled isolation, ancient Tibetan culture, and some of the most dramatic mountain scenery in the world.

description: Experience the legendary Tiji Festival in the walled city of Lo Manthang. This 21-day journey takes you into the heart of the forbidden kingdom of Upper Mustang to witness a three-day ritual known as 'The Chasing of the Demons'. You will see masked dances by monks, colorful traditional costumes, and ancient rituals aimed at bringing peace and prosperity to the region, all set against the dramatic desert landscape of Mustang.

These lakes are of great religious significance to Hindus and Buddhists alike. The trek passes through the high-altitude desert of Mustang, crossing several high passes and offering spectacular views of the Damodar Himal and the surrounding peaks.

Kailash, and the sacred Lake Mansarovar. This tour includes the three-day Kailash Kora (circumambulation) crossing the high Dolma La pass (5,630m), offering a life-changing experience for pilgrims and adventure seekers alike.

You will experience the vibrant culture of Buddhist communities, witness traditional rituals, and trek through beautiful landscapes reflecting human efforts in the course of civilization.

itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to Bagor. Visit the monastery at Diyale.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kurima to Chitre
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek along the GHT Sub Trail to the village with two monasteries.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chitre to Dimbul
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek through Dhodre to reach Dimbul. Scenic beauty of lower Solu.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dimbul to Nirkum
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek. Visit the monastery and learn about local topography.

itinerary.title: Trek from Nirkum to Shyare
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek targeting the best possible site around the village monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Shyare to Bung
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek through a vibrant atmosphere created by human influence.

itinerary.title: Trek from Bung to Khiraule
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to a village rich in rhododendron and ancient monasteries.

itinerary.title: Trek from Khiraule to Cherem
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek passing through Mani walls reflecting ancient civilization.

itinerary.title: Trek from Cherem to Kharikhola
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek joining the popular Jiri-Everest route.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kharikhola to Takshindu
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek with magnificent views of Kusum Kangaru.

itinerary.title: Trek to Thupten Choling
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek through Ringmo to the large Sherpa settlement and monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Thupten Choling to Phaplu
itinerary.desc: Descend to Junbeshi village and visit the monastery before reaching Phaplu.

itinerary.title: Drive from Phaplu to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Morning drive back to the capital by sharing jeep.

itinerary.title: Transfer to International Airport
itinerary.desc: Final transfer for your flight home.
